<includeonly>
{| class="formtable"
! Subject page title: {{FieldTooltip|Subject page title}}
| [[Subject::{{PAGENAME}}]]
|-
! Reviewer: {{FieldTooltip|Reviewer}}
| [[Reviewer::{{{Reviewer|}}}| ]] [[:User:{{{Reviewer|}}}|{{{Reviewer|}}}]]
|-
! Review date: {{FieldTooltip|Review date}}
| [[Review date::{{{Review date|}}}]]
|-
! Review state: {{FieldTooltip|Review state}}
| [[Review state::{{{Review state|}}}]]
|-
! Quality control tags: 
| {{#arraymap: {{{Quality control tag|}}}|,|@@@|<div>@@@ {{#set: Quality control tag=@@@}}</div>|}}
|}
{{#if: {{#show: {{PAGENAME}}|?Categories}}|
{{#arraymap:{{#ask: [[{{PAGENAME}}]] |?Categories= |mainlabel=- |link=none |format=array |manysep=; |sep=;}}|;|x|[[Subject categories::{{#replace:x|Category:|}}| ]]|}}
}}
[[Category:Reviews]]<!--
-->{{#ifexist: {{PAGENAME}}
      |[[Semantic Dependency::{{PAGENAME}}| ]]
      |[[Category:Orphaned reviews]]
   }}
[[Semantic Dependency::Help:Needs_review/Missing_review| ]]
[[Semantic Dependency::Help:Needs_review/Flagged_for_review| ]]
[[Semantic Dependency::Help:Needs_review/Stale_reviews| ]]
</includeonly><noinclude>

The template renders a single Review page in a Review namespace
[[Category:Document states]]

</noinclude>
